---
id: get-latest-devices-positions
title: "Get Latest Devices Positions"
description: "Get latest positions of customer devices (maximum of last 7 days). Only one latest position is possible for a single device independent of source: either Celltower or GPS. This means that `source` query parameter selection can lead to no latest position returned for some devices."
sidebar_label: "Get Latest Devices Positions"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: api/1nce-os/1-nce-os
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get Latest Devices Positions"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/v1/locate/positions/latest"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Get latest positions of customer devices (maximum of last 7 days). Only one latest position is possible for a single device independent of source: either Celltower or GPS. This means that `source` query parameter selection can lead to no latest position returned for some devices.
